title: rosa communis var. recognita
intro: Rosa communis var. recognita, also known as Rosa canina or dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich content of flavonoids, anthocyanins, and ascorbic acid, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Rosa communis var. recognita have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, while its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rosa communis var. recognita is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to promote wound healing and skin health.
